value.body:
## Context

The inbox should help users process meaningful team activity rather than become a raw event stream.

## Outcome

Users can configure which repository events create inbox items or notifications, and they can filter team activity by reason and repository.

## Acceptance criteria

- Preferences cover mentions, assignment, status changes, comments, agent completion, sync warnings, and repository failures.
- Inbox summary and filters respect configured preferences without hiding existing unread items unexpectedly.
- Notifications link to the relevant ticket, repository, or agent task.
- Defaults preserve the current inbox behavior for existing users.
- Tests cover preference persistence and filtering behavior.

frontmatter.title: Add inbox notification preferences and team activity rules

value.title: Add inbox notification preferences and team activity rules
